notes: openclaw's cost formula is: tokens * cost.input / 1e6 (see dist/usage-format-*.js:estimateUsageCost). Values here are $ per 1M tokens — the industry-standard pricing quote.

Direct providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, xAI, Mistral, Bedrock) ship real prices in openclaw's upstream catalog. This file ONLY overrides the ones that ship $0 (currently Moonshot — tracked upstream in openclaw/openclaw#67928).
For OpenRouter-routed models, use OpenRouter's live API (https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/models) instead of this file — it returns current per-token rates.
China-region Moonshot (platform.kimi.com) is cheaper in CNY; the values below are the international USD tier from platform.kimi.ai.
